description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with terracotta tiles and a prominent overhang above the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, complemented by white-framed windows and a small circular attic window. A covered porch area extends from the front, supported by a wooden beam, and a lantern hangs near the entryway for illumination. The property is enclosed by a white picket fence, and the yard is covered with green grass and a few scattered orange objects, possibly decorative items or fruit. Window boxes with dark soil or plants are visible beneath the windows on the side. The overall design is quaint and residential, evoking a cozy suburban or semi-rural home.
description: A cozy beige house with a steep terracotta gable roof, white picket fence, and a covered porch entryway. Features include white-framed windows, a hanging lantern, and a grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance under a covered porch, circular attic window, and hanging lantern beside the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two vertically aligned windows with window boxes, the lantern, and the full extent of the picket fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with minimal features and the continuation of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the dual gable roof structure and the fenced grassy yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a wooden support beam, hanging lantern, and a simple wooden door
